channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada Targets Gold Medals in Final Days of Winter Paralympics
item.description: Canada heads into the final weekend of the 2026 Winter Paralympics in northern Italy with strong medal prospects across multiple sports. Skier Natalie Wilkie of Salmon Arm, B.C., claimed her second go...

item.title: KwaZulu-Natal MEC urges statue of Mangosuthu Buthelezi to honour his role in liberation history
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal MEC for Co-operative Governance and Traditional Affairs, Thulasizwe Buthelezi, has urged that the late Prince Mangosuthu Buthelezi, founder of the Inkatha Freedom Party (IFP), be commemo...

item.title: Akpabio Says Politicians Joining APC Show Appreciation For Tinubu Administration
item.description: Senate President Godswill Akpabio don talk say all those wey dey waka go join All Progressives Congress (APC) dey show gratitude to President Bola Tinubu-led government for wetin dem don achieve since...

item.title: Mehidy Hasan Miraz Run-Out Raises Sportsmanship Debate in Second ODI Between Pakistan and Bangladesh
item.description: During the second One-Day International in Dhaka, Bangladesh captain Mehidy Hasan Miraz became the centre of a sportsmanship debate after running out Pakistan’s batter Salman Ali Agha in a controversi...

item.title: China Calls for Dialogue to Ease Pak-Afghan Border Tensions
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi has urged Pakistan and Afghanistan to handle their ongoing tensions through dialogue rather than military action, according to a statement from Beijing. In a phone cal...

item.title: US military strikes Kharg Island as Middle East tensions escalate
item.description: The conflict between the United States and Iran has intensified, with President Donald Trump confirming a US strike on Iran’s strategic Kharg Island. While Trump claims the bombing targeted military f...

item.title: Ted Cruz and Tucker Carlson trade barbs over U.S. role in Iran conflict
item.description: Republican Senator Ted Cruz and right‑wing media host Tucker Carlson have reignited their public feud amid rising tensions over possible U.S. military involvement in Israel’s campaign against Iran. Th...

item.title: Senator Binos Yaroe Leaves PDP for ADC to Strengthen Opposition Politics
item.description: Senator Binos Yaroe wey dey represent Adamawa South don officially leave the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) join the African Democratic Congress (ADC). He explain say the main reason for this move na ...

item.title: Australia Considers Temporary Easing of Russian Oil Ban as Rural Fuel Shortages Rise
item.description: Energy Minister Chris Bowen has indicated that Australia may consider temporarily easing its total ban on Russian oil and petrol imports amid growing concerns over domestic fuel shortages. Bowen highl...

item.title: Siyifunile Secondary launches robotics lab to boost digital skills
item.description: Learners at Siyifunile Secondary School in Dullstroom now have access to a new robotics laboratory, marking a significant step in bridging the digital divide for rural students. Established through a ...

item.title: US strikes Iranian oil hub as tensions rise in Middle East
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran escalated significantly, with recent US strikes targeting key military and oil infrastructure on Iran’s Kharg Island. The US has reported destruction of mil...

item.title: Exploring Malta and Gozo: History, Culture, and Local Life
item.description: This travel article explores the Maltese islands of Malta and Gozo, focusing on their rich history, culture, and unique local experiences. The journey begins with the historic Three Cities—Birgu, Borm...

item.title: Vince Bruni-Bossio Appointed President of the University of Saskatchewan
item.description: Vince Bruni-Bossio, originally from Jasper, Alberta, has recently assumed his role as the 12th president of the University of Saskatchewan, beginning his five-year term on January 1. Born to Italian i...

item.title: Blind date between Robin and Jacquie: a pleasant evening despite differences
item.description: Robin, 68, a retired property manager, and Jacquie, 69, a retired secretary, went on a blind date organised by The Guardian. Both were hoping to meet someone with a kind personality and shared interes...

item.title: Court Hears Allegations of Fake Passport in London Property Case Involving Ozekhome and Useni
item.description: For Abuja High Court, one witness don talk say Senior Advocate of Nigeria, Mike Ozekhome and Ponfa Useni fit don use fake Nigerian passport to claim London property wey dey connected to late former FC...

item.title: Comelec assures clean and orderly special polls in Antipolo
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has assured the public that the special elections in the second district of Antipolo City will be free from cheating or any form of electoral fraud. Comelec Chair...

item.title: Parliament proposes bill defining transgender identity with medical verification, removing self-perceived gender clause
item.description: In a significant amendment to existing law, the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill 2026 was tabled in the Lok Sabha. The bill proposes removal of the clause allowing self-percei...

item.title: UNHCR Reports Up to 3.2 Million Internally Displaced in Iran Due to Ongoing US-Israeli Conflict
item.description: The United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) has reported that between 600,000 and one million Iranian households, equating to as many as 3.2 million people, have been temporarily displac...

item.title: How Finance Solutions Are Strengthening Tanzania’s Regional Supply Chains
item.description: Dar es Salaam – As demand for food, minerals, and manufactured goods in East Africa continues to grow, Tanzania is positioning itself as a dependable supplier to neighbouring countries like Kenya, Rwa...

item.title: House Committee to Review Eligibility of VP Sara Duterte’s Lawyers in Impeachment Case
item.description: The House Committee on Justice will review whether two lawyers, Michael Poa and Reynold Munsayac, should be allowed to represent Vice President Sara Duterte in her impeachment proceedings. Bicol Saro ...
